headline: CCL Stock Gains 11% in 3 Months, Still Trails Industry: Buy or Wait?
summary: Carnival has gained in recent months, but strong bookings, pricing and fleet investments are competing with geopolitical risks and softer European demand.

headline: 2 Momentum  Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Exciting developments are taking place for the stocks in this article. They’ve all surged ahead of the broader market over the last month as catalysts such as new products and positive media coverage have propelled their returns.
